title: 以下、進めて。本番環境で動作するか確認せよ。 • 解決しました。Hybrid Failover の即 fail 文言は AGENTS.md で recovery matrix 前提に修正し、run- kernel-council-review.sh には実際の recovery retry を追加しました。最初の council 判定が落ちて も、1 回だけ force_copilot_continuity + gemini/xai backfill + metered override で再試行し、それ でもだめなときだけ fail します。あわせて test-shadow-continui...
summary_text: **Findings (status-only handoff gaps)** 1. Production gate currently permits non-live pass. In [`fugue-orchestration-gate.yml`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/fugue-orchestration-gate.yml) L214, kernel readiness runs with `KERNEL_VOTE_READINESS_LIVE_SMOKE_MODE=off`; and [`check-kernel-vote-readiness.sh`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/check-kernel-vote-readiness.sh) L278-L293 treats skipped smoke as success. What tests should assert: for production verification path, gate must require `LIVE_SMOKE_MODE=required` and `PROVIDER_PROBE_MODE=required`, and fail closed otherwise. 2. Handoff tests validate dispatch submission, not downstream execution. [`route-task-handoff.sh`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/harness/route-task-handoff.sh) L592-L606 sets `handoff=true` right after `gh workflow run`; tests like [`test-route-task-handoff.sh`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/tests/test-route-task-handoff.sh) L89+ and [`test-vote-handoff-simulation.sh`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/tests/test-vote-handoff-simulation.sh) L146+ only check command shape. What tests should assert: dispatch must be correlated to a concrete run ID and polled to terminal status; fail if run is missing/failed. (Pattern already exists in [`test-run-canary-progress-wait.sh`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/tests/test-run-canary-progress-wait.sh) L193-L209.) 3. Local consensus prompt contract allows status-only closure unless explicitly overridden. [`vote.md`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.codex/prompts/vote.md) L10/L73 says local continuation, no CI inspection by default; this is enforced by [`check-codex-vote-prompt.sh`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/check-codex-vote-prompt.sh) L129/L134. What tests should assert: when task intent is production verification, prompt contract must require GHA evidence (`run_id`, `conclusion`, council artifact) and reject status-only handoff. 4. “Live” recovery naming overstates coverage. [`test-recovery-pass-live.sh`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/tests/test-recovery-pass-live.sh) is policy-function simulation (shadow continuity), not GHA council e2e. What tests should assert: a separate production-verification test must prove `first fail -> recovery-pass` on downstream GHA run via `council-status.json` fields (`recovery_attempted=true`, pass conclusion). Status-only handoff in these paths is effectively a workflow-policy violation for production verification because it lacks multi-lane execution evidence, only submission/status snapshots.
